subcodes.first_line: O learned handmaiden! Render praise unto the Lord, thy God, that thou hast attained thy heart's desire and art confirmed in faith and steadfast in His Covenant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه متعلمه حمد کن حضرت معبود را که بمقصود رسیدی و بایمان و ثبوت بر پیمان
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
